subcategory: WebGL GLSL shader with animated starship visual
use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for creative agency landing pages
Animated visual displays for space or gaming-themed websites
Portfolio or showcase sections requiring eye-catching WebGL effects
Landing page hero sections for tech or SaaS products
ai_summary: A WebGL shader component using @react-three/fiber that renders an animated starship-themed visual effect with GLSL shaders. The component creates a dynamic space-style animation with time-based uniforms and procedural noise textures, suitable for hero sections or creative landing pages where immersive visual effects are needed.
